chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5902 - وَ رَوَى اَلْمُفَضَّلُ بْنُ عُمَرَ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ اَلثُّمَالِيِّ عَنْ حَبَابَةَ اَلْوَالِبِيَّةِ رَضِيَ اَللَّهُ عَنْهَا قَالَ سَمِعْتُ مَوْلاَيَ أَمِيرَ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ : "إِنَّا أَهْلُ بَيْتٍ لاَ نَشْرَبُ اَلْمُسْكِرَ وَ لاَ نَأْكُلُ اَلْجِرِّيَّ وَ لاَ نَمْسَحُ عَلَى اَلْخُفَّيْنِ فَمَنْ كَانَ مِنْ شِيعَتِنَا فَلْيَقْتَدِ بِنَا وَ لْيَسْتَنَّ بِسُنَّتِنَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5902 - Al-Mufaddal ibn Umar narrated from Thabit Al-Thumali from Hababah Al-Walibiyyah (may Allah (swt) be pleased with her) who said:
"I heard my master, the Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), say:
'Indeed, we are the Ahlul Bayt who do not drink intoxicants, do not eat catfish, and do not wipe over leather socks (in ablution).
So whoever is from our Shia should follow our example and adhere to our Sunnah.'"
